phase1_abstract_interpretation.summary: The queryRandom function in eth2_discovery.nim processes peer ENR records from the discovery protocol. Analysis identified 5 state anomalies.

state_anomalies_found.description: cgcCountNode decoded as uint8 without validation against CUSTODY_REQUIREMENT (4) to NUMBER_OF_CUSTODY_GROUPS (128)

state_anomalies_found.type: Trust Boundary - No Fork Digest Whitelist

phase2_symbolic_execution.summary: Symbolic execution reveals cgcCountNode used without range validation but O(1) comparison only

counterexample.effect: Invalid values fail matching criteria silently but no DoS or protocol violation

phase3_invariant_proving.summary: Invariant 'cgcCountNode validated against protocol bounds' cannot be proven but impact is limited
phase3_invariant_proving.reason: False positive - cgcCountNode used only in constant-time equality check

reachability.notes: Untrusted discovery peers can advertise malicious ENR data

reasoning: Missing validation is protocol compliance issue, not security vulnerability
